articles.description:
Burger King celebrates the 2025 Halloween season with the launch of the new Monster Menu, which gives a Halloween twist to some of the chain's classic menu items.

Here's what you'll find on Burger King's Monster Menu:
- Jack-O-Lantern Whopper - A flame-grilled beef patty, American cheese, bacon, tomatoes, lettuce, onions, pickles, ketchup, and mayo, on a Jack O' Lantern orange bun with black sesame seeds.
- Vampire Nuggets - Crispy chicken nuggets shaped like vampire fangs and bats served in a carton sporting a coffin design. You can get them as part of a King Jr. Meal or a la carte.  
- Mummy Mozzarella Fries - Mozzarella sticks "wrapped" in golden breading and then fried (i.e. regular mozzarella sticks). They are served in a limited-edition mummy-themed box with a side of marinara dipping sauce.
- Franken-Candy Sundae - Vanilla soft serve topped with a "franken-mix" of Oreo cookie crumbles, purple franken-candy syrup, and purple and green popping candy.
The Monster Menu is available now at participating locations nationwide.
The menu is joined this Halloween by collectible Scooby-Doo kids' meal toys, Halloween-themed paper crowns, and limited-edition Monster Menu-inspired Halloween buckets. The toys and crowns are available now, while the buckets arrive starting October 13, 2025, at participating restaurants, while supplies last.
Photo via Burger King.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Burger King Introduces New Monster Menu for Halloween

articles.description:
It's once again pumpkin season at Culver's with the return of the Pumpkin Spice Shake and Salted Caramel Pumpkin Concrete Mixer.

The Pumpkin Spice Shake features pureed pumpkin and pumpkin pie spices blended with milk and vanilla frozen custard, and dusted with cinnamon. Prices vary, but a location in Milwaukee, WI, sells a small for 4.29, a medium for $5.49, and a large for $6.39.
The Salted Caramel Pumpkin Concrete Mixer features vanilla frozen custard mixed with pureed pumpkin, pumpkin pie spices, and salted caramel. The same location charges $4.49 for a mini, $4.79 for a small, $5.69 for a medium, and $7.89 for a large.
Both seasonal desserts are available now for a limited time.
Photo via Culver's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Culver's Brings Back Pumpkin Shake and Concrete Mixer

articles.description:
Bojangles adds the new Salted Caramel Apple Crisp to the menu as the chain's latest seasonal cobbler.

Bojangles' Salted Caramel Apple Crisp is available now through the end of the year at participating locations. It features a warm apple topping, cinnamon streusel, and salted caramel served over a scratch-made buttermilk biscuit (i.e., it's apple crisp on a biscuit).
The price of the fall treat varies, but a location in Smyrna, GA sells them for $1.99 each. 
Previous seasonal cobbler flavors have included Peach, Strawberry, and Bo-Berry.
Photo via Bojangles.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Bojangles Welcomes New Salted Caramel Apple Crisp

Wingstop adds a new flavor for the 2025 Halloween season: Haunted Habanero.

The new flavor is described by the chain in the following fashion: "Scary good. Wicked hot. This flavor haunts your taste buds with a slow-building burn that lingers long after the first bite." It rates a five out of five on Wingstop's heat scale.
Available for a limited time now, Haunted Habanero can be ordered on any of Wingstop's wings, boneless wings, chicken sandwiches, and tenders.
Photo via Wingstop.
Read more at Brand Eating!

The new Salsa Roja features a roasted tomatillo base with chipotle adobo, jalapeno peppers, chili peppers, and garlic powder.
Items on the new Del Dorado Chicken Menu include:

- New Del Dorado Chicken Grilled Burrito (pictured)- Grilled marinated chicken, Salsa Roja, shredded spicy Jack cheese, cilantro lime rice, shredded cabbage, pico de gallo, and sou…

articles.description:
Baskin-Robbins launches new Galactic Brownie ice cream as a limited-time flavor with a cosmic theme. It's joined by the new Galactic Brownie Polar Pizza.

The new ice cream is the Flavor of the Month for October and features brownie batter ice cream swirled with gooey chocolate icing, chewy brownie pieces, and rainbow chips. You can get it by the scoop in a cup or cone or in any number of treats offered by the ice cream parlor chain, including in a milkshake or ice cream cake.
The Galactic Brownie Polar Pizza is positioned as a sweet, shareable dessert for Halloween, one of the busiest nights for pizza delivery. It features a double fudge brownie crust topped with Galactic Brownie ice cream, M&M's Milk Chocolate Candies, a drizzle of fudge, and Halloween-themed sprinkles.
Galactic or cosmic brownies are a popular dessert to make at home with an appearance reminiscent of a sky full of stars. In stores, you'll most likely have come across them either as Little Debbie Cosmic Brownies and/or Pure Protein Galactic Brownie bars.
Baskin-Robbins also has two deals for its rewards members this month:


Throughout October, Baskin-Robbins Rewards members can get 20% off any Polar Pizza.
On October 31, 2025, you can get 31% off all scoops of ice cream.


Photo via Baskin-Robbins.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Baskin-Robbins Launches New Galactic Brownie Ice Cream

articles.description:
Taco Bell's Chili Cheese Burrito features chili and shredded cheese wrapped up in a warm flour tortilla.

It cost me $2.99 for one.
I last had one of these over 10 years ago (i.e., the pre-quarter days), so I thought it'd be fun to see if anything has changed from what I remember.
When I previously reviewed the Chili Cheese Burrito, it was very liquid with a high potential of causing a mess. Fortunately, the years have been kind (or I was just lucky), and this particular Chili Cheese Burrito was less watery and didn't threaten to spill out with every bite I took.
Texture-wise, the chili is similar to Taco Bell's seasoned ground beef, only with more liquid. The cheese was thoroughly melted, and the flour tortilla was soft but sturdy.



As far as how it tastes, it's a pretty standard beef chili. It's enjoyable but not particularly outstanding. There's a tomato base with typical chili spices (garlic, onion, chili powder, etc.). There's just a bare hint of heat to it. It's joined by a bit of generic creaminess from the very mild cheese.
If you want a handheld chili, it's not a bad way to go and is certainly meatier than your typical Taco Bell fare. It's one of the rare Taco Bell savory menu items that doesn't taste like anything else on the menu. For the purposes of the review, I got it without any customizations, but I'd recommend adding onions (free at my local Taco Bell, but some locations charge for them) and getting it grilled for extra flavor and texture.
Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Chili Cheese Burrito
Calories - 380
Fat - 17g (Saturated Fat - 9g)
Sodium - 970mg
Carbs - 41g (Sugar - 2g)
Protein - 15g
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Re-Review: Taco Bell - Chili Cheese Burrito (2025)

articles.description:
In addition to the previously announced return of the CurderBurger, Culver's introduces the new Roasted Garlic & Bacon Pub Burger.

Available for a limited time through November 30, 2025, the latest pub burger from Culver's features one, two, or three beef patties, Wisconsin cheddar cheese, thick-cut bacon, garlic mayo, lettuce, tomato, and pickles, on a lightly buttered and toasted garlic herb pretzel bun.
Prices vary, but at a location in Milwaukee, WI, the  Roasted Garlic & Bacon Pub Burger starts at $7.89 for a single (up to $12.98 for a triple). Getting it with a combo meal (with fries and a drink) costs $4.20 more.
Photo via Culver's.
Read more at Brand Eating!

articles.description:
Shake Shack is offering a Halloween special where you can buy a SmokeShack burger and get a second one for free through October 11, 2025. The chain plans to reveal BOGO deals on two other sandwiches: one on October 12, 2025, and one on October 22, 2025.

The Halloween BOGO deal is only available when ordering at an in-restaurant kiosk, through the Shake Shack website, and through the Shake Shack mobile app using the promo code "SPOOKY" at checkout (you have to have two SmokeShacks in your cart for the code to apply). Orders made through the Shake Shack website and mobile app can be for pickup or delivery. There's a limit of one free burger per order.
The SmokeShack features a quarter-pound Angus beef patty, American cheese, applewood-smoked bacon, chopped cherry peppers, and ShackSauce on a toasted potato bun.
Photo via Shake Shack.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Shake Shack Offers BOGO SmokeShack Through October 11, 2025

articles.description:
Boo Batter Ice Cream makes its annual return to Cold Stone Creamery locations nationwide for the 2025 Halloween season. The seasonal, pitch-black cake batter ice cream is featured in the following treats:

- Treat or Treat Creation - Boo Batter Ice Cream folded with Kit Kat, Halloween Oreo Cookies, and M&M's.
- Witches' Boo Shake - A seasonal shake made with Boo Batter Ice Cream and Halloween Oreo Cookies, crowned with whipped topping and "spooky" (orange pumpkins, black bats, and white ghosts) sprinkles.
- Boo Batter Ice Cream Taco (pictured) - Boo Batter Ice Cream wrapped in an orange waffle taco, coated with chocolate and spooky sprinkles (i.e., a Halloween-themed Choco Taco).
Boo Batter Ice Cream and its related desserts are available for a limited time now through October 31, 2025.
Photo via Cold Stone Creamery.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Boo Batter is Back at Cold Stone Creamery for Halloween 2025

articles.description:
Whataburger's Buffalo Ranch Chicken Strip Sandwich is back on the menu for a limited time this fall.

Inspired by Buffalo chicken wings (and in time for football season), the sandwich features three crispy-fried Whatachick'n Strips, two slices of Monterey Jack cheese, Buffalo Sauce, and Creamy Buttermilk Ranch, served on a toasted five-inch bun. A Jr. version (on a four-inch bun with two chicken strips) is also available for smaller appetites.
Prices vary, but a location in Dallas charges $7.59 for a Buffalo Ranch Chicken Strip Sandwich by itself and $11.29 for a Whatameal that includes the sandwich, medium fries, and a medium drink.
Photo via Whataburger.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Buffalo Ranch Chicken Strip Sandwich Returns to Whataburger

articles.description:
Dairy Queen spins up the new Oreo Reese's Blizzard as its October Blizzard of the Month.

The seasonal dessert features vanilla soft serve blended with Oreo cookies and Reese's Peanut Butter Cups.
You can find it now for a limited time at participating locations nationwide. It should be noted that Dairy Queen regularly serves an Oreo Blizzard and a Reese's Blizzard, so it could easily offer an Oreo Reese's Blizzard year-round.
Other limited-time Blizzard flavors right now include the Pumpkin Pie Blizzard, Choco-Dipped Strawberry Blizzard, and Caramel Toffee Cookie Blizzard.
The Pumpkin Pie Blizzard offers vanilla soft serve mixed with pumpkin pie pieces and crowned with whipped topping and a sprinkle of nutmeg.
The Choco-Dipped Strawberry Blizzard consists of vanilla soft serve blended with sweet strawberry topping and choco chunks.
The Caramel Toffee Cookie Blizzard features vanilla soft serve blended with chewy cookie pieces, toffee, and caramel.
Photo via Dairy Queen.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Dairy Queen Serves Up New Oreo Reese's Blizzard

articles.description:
Bakery-cafe chain Paris Baguette features cookie butter and pumpkin in its 2025 fall menu. This year's seasonal lineup includes:

- Biscoff Cookie Butter Layer Cake - Three layers of vanilla sponge cake filled with Biscoff cookie butter soft cream, topped with a Biscoff cookie butter topping and Biscoff cookies. You can order a whole cake or slices.
- Biscoff Cookie Butter Cruffin - A croissant muffin filled with Biscoff cookie butter cream, topped with cookie butter icing and a Biscoff cookie.
- Biscoff Cookie Butter King Cream Donut - A soft donut filled with Biscoff cookie butter cream, topped with Biscoff icing and a Biscoff cookie.
- Cookie Butter Macchiato - Espresso, vanilla, and your choice of steamed milk, drizzled with cookie butter sauce. The drink is available hot or iced.
- Pumpkin Pie Custard Tart - A buttery tart shell filled with pumpkin pie custard, dusted with powdered sugar.
- Pumpkin Scone - A spiced scone loaded with toasted pumpkin seeds and finished with a pumpkin icing drizzle.
- Pumpkin Pie Latte - Espresso, pumpkin puree, white chocolate sauce, and your choice of milk, lightly dusted with cinnamon. It's available hot or iced.
- Pumpkin Pie Sweet Cream Cold Brew - Cold brew coffee mixed with pumpkin puree and white chocolate sauce, topped with sweet cream and cinnamon.
The fall menu is available for a limited time at Paris Baguette locations across the US.
Photo via Paris Baguette.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Paris Baguette's 2025 Fall Menu Highlights Pumpkin and Cookie Butter

articles.description:
Jollibee partners with international K-pop girl group Katseye to launch a new Korean BBQ Chicken Sandwich and Korean BBQ Fried Chicken.

Available across North America for a limited time, the new menu items feature a sweet and savory Korean BBQ sauce made with a soy glaze and gochujang (Korean red chili paste)
The new Kateyes Special: Korean BBQ Chicken Sandwich consists of a crispy-fried, hand-breaded chicken filet dipped in the new Korean BBQ sauce and served with fresh cucumber slices, thin-sliced red onion, and cilantro on a toasted brioche bun.
The sandwich is available by itself or in a combo, while the fried chicken can be ordered in a bucket or in a combo.
Kateyes Special: Korean BBQ Fried Chicken features Jollibee's signature fried chicken hand-dipped in the new Korean BBQ sauce.
Photo via Jollibee.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Jollibee Welcomes New Korean BBQ Chicken Sandwich and Korean BBQ Fried Chicken

articles.description:
Firehouse Subs brings back the Thanksgiving Turkey Sub for a limited time this fall. The seasonal sandwich is joined by new sides and a dessert, including Gravy, Extra Cheesy Mac & Cheese, and a Double Chocolate Chip Cookie, to cover the general aspects of a Thanksgiving meal (i.e., turkey, sides, and dessert).

- Thanksgiving Turkey Sub -  Carved turkey breast, savory stuffing, sweet cranberry sauce, and mayo, served hot on a toasted sub roll.
- New Gravy - A "rich, savory gravy with notes of garlic, roasted turkey, and vegetable stock." Firehouse Subs recommends dunking your sandwich in it.
- New Extra Cheesy Mac & Cheese - Cavatappi noodles with a creamy mix of American, cheddar, Neufchatel, Monterey Jack, Queso, and asadero cheeses.
- New Double Chocolate Chip Cookie - Made with a cocoa-based dough packed with semi-sweet chocolate and creamy white chocolate chunks.
The sub and new menu items are available now at participating restaurants nationwide.
Photo via Firehouse Subs.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Firehouse Subs Brings Back Thanksgiving Turkey Sub

articles.description:
Wendy's launches new Chicken Tenders (or "Tendys" as they're colloquially calling them, as the term happens to rhyme with the chain's name) as a new core menu item. The tenders are joined by six new dipping sauces.

The new chicken strips are described as "flavor-packed and savory, made with seasoned, crispy breading and juicy, all-white-meat chicken." The new dipping sauces include:


Wendy's Signature - A "creamy sauce with hints of black pepper, hot sauce, and tons of savory goodness."
Sweet Chili - A "Sweet and subtly spicy sauce with a touch of tang, including notes of sriracha, garlic, and ginger."
Scorchin' Hot - A "creamy hot sauce with a heat that builds."
Creamy Ranch - "Extra creamy and extra rich."
Honey BBQ - "A little bit sweet, a little bit smoky."
Honey Mustard - "Sweet honey and lightly tangy mustard with a rich Dijon flavor."


Wendy's Chicken Tenders are available now at locations nationwide. They can be purchased in three- or four-piece orders, which include two dipping sauces. Combo meals and a Kid's Meal (with two pieces and a dipping sauce) are also available.
Prices vary, but three tenders cost $5.39 at my local Wendy's in Los Angeles, while four tenders cost $7.19.
Wendy's has offered chicken tenders before. They were introduced in 2017 and discontinued in 2019.
Photo via Wendy's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: New Chicken Tenders Arrive at Wendy's

articles.description:
Crumbl bakes a new Triple Berry Shortcake as part of this week's limited-time dessert menu from September 29 through October 4, 2025.

Here's what this week's menu looks like:
- Triple Berry Shortcake - A two-layer vanilla shortcake with whipped cream, topped with house-made triple berry jam.
- Chocolate Peanut Butter Cookie featuring Oreo - A warm chocolate cookie with Oreo cookie pieces and peanut butter chips, topped with a peanut butter mousse and a mini Oreo cookie
- Confetti Cake Cookie - A warm sugar cookie with confetti sprinkles, topped with pink vanilla cream cheese frosting, and more confetti sprinkles.
- Molten Lava Cookie - A warm, dark chocolate cookie filled with hot fudge and sprinkled with powdered sugar.
- Pumpkin Pie Cookie - A chilled, buttery pie crust cookie topped with spiced pumpkin pie filling, a rosette of whipped cream, and a dusting of cinnamon.
- Semi-Sweet Chocolate Chunk Cookie - A warm cookie packed with semi-sweet chocolate chunks and a sprinkle of flaky sea salt.
- Weekly "Secret Menu" - A mystery cookie or dessert that varies with location. You can check the Crumbl website or mobile app to see what's available near you.
Photo via Crumbl.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Crumbl Bakes New Triple Berry Shortcake

articles.description:
BJ's Restaurant & Brewhouse brings back its Spooky Pizookie as part of its seasonal menu ahead of Halloween 2025.

The Spooky Pizookie is a Cookies 'N' Cream cookie topped with Oreo crumbs, Halloween sprinkles, and a stack of two scoops of vanilla bean ice cream. It's served with a "transforming crackable chocolate topping" that you pour on yourself.
Also featured on the seasonal menu are:
- Unlucky Ducky - A cocktail made with Altos Plata Tequila,| Malibu Coconut Rum, Absolut Mandrin Vodka, Bols Peach Schnapps, Bols Triple Sec, Monin Sweet and Sour, pineapple juice, Starry, and fresh lemon, served in a mini bathtub with a rubber ducky.
- Blueberry Sour - Maker’s Mark Bourbon, Monin Sweet and Sour, Monin Blood Orange, Monin Agave, blueberries, fresh lemon juice, and dried blood orange.
- Orange Scream-Sicle - A non-alcoholic beverage featuring BJ’s Handcrafted Orange Cream Soda mixed with Monin Blood Orange, and cream, topped with whipped cream, a fresh raspberry "nose", mint "hair," and "spooky" gummy eyes.
- Sweet & Spicy Asian Glazed Wings - A new "signature" sauce for boneless and bone-in wings.
- Dill Pickle Ranch Wings - A new "signature" dry rub for boneless and bone-in wings.
- Brewhouse Bites Sampler - A tray of Sliders, Mozzarella Sticks, Bone-In or Boneless Wings, and Chips with a choice of Spinach & Artichoke Dip, Housemade Guacamole, or Sriracha Queso Dip.
The casual dining chain also brings back its Oktoberfest Beer, a "smooth, traditional Oktoberfest-style amber lager," for a limited time. 
Photo via BJ's Restauran & Brewhouse.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: BJ's Restaurant & Brewhouse Welcomes 2025 Halloween Menu

articles.description:
El Pollo Loco launches new Double Chicken Burrito Bowls in two varieties for a limited time this fall.

There's the Queso Crunch Double Chicken Burrito Bowl and the Street Corn Double Chicken Burrito Bowl.
The Queso Crunch Double Chicken Burrito Bowl (pictured) features pinto beans and seasoned rice, topped with warm queso blanco, a double portion of citrus-marinated flame-grilled chicken, shredded jack cheese, handmade guacamole, chopped cilantro, and salsa fresca. Tortilla strips are included on the side.
The Street Corn Double Chicken Burrito Bowl is inspired by elotes and consists of seasoned rice and pinto beans, topped with a double portion of citrus-marinated flame-grilled chicken, creamy chipotle sauce, handmade guacamole, shredded jack cheese, crumbled cotija, roasted corn, roasted red bell peppers, chopped cilantro, and salsa fresca.
Prices vary, but my local El Pollo Loco in Los Angeles charges $12.79 for each bowl.
El Pollo Loco is also offering the Fam Feast as a limited-time, discounted group meal exclusively to its rewards members. The Fam Feast includes eight pieces of citrus-marinated flame-grilled chicken, three large sides, eight warm flour or corn tortillas (or a large order of tortilla chips), and four churros. Prices vary, but it costs $29.99 near me with legs and thighs ($34.49 for mixed chicken pieces).
Photo via El Pollo Loco.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: New Double Chicken Burrito Bowls Arrive at El Pollo Loco

articles.description:
Little Caesars' Ultimate Cheesesteak Pizza features a large round original crust topped with a cheesy white sauce, mozzarella, seasoned sliced steak, onions, green peppers, and mushrooms.

I bought one for $16.99. The price is more than any listed pizza on the menu (the next closest in price is the 5 Meat Feast for $14.99).



The pizza hit the cheesesteak theme very well. Between the mozzarella and the cheesy white sauce, it was very cheesy with a nice stretch and a surprising buttery note.



The steak wasn't abundant or spread evenly, but it offered a tender bite and good, lightly seasoned meatiness.



The veggies were also good. They were just cooked through, so they weren't mushy and still had a decent bite. Additionally, they had a strong but not overpowering presence taste-wise, particularly the mushrooms. Just a note: Little Caesars in California uses fresh mushrooms, given the proximity to all the farms in Central California. That is not necessarily the case in other states, so your mileage may vary.
The crust was okay. It was sturdy with some chew to it and some crisping here and there.



Overall, Little Caesars' Ultimate Cheesesteak Pizza hit the nail on the head as far as cheesesteak pizzas go. The flavors and textures hit the right notes. However, while the cheesiness was great, I would have liked at more beef (I get that steak is expensive, but wonder if ground beef would have worked). Also, the price is a bit steep for what I got.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Review: Little Caesars - Ultimate Cheesesteak Pizza

articles.description:
IHOP introduces new Coffee Cake Pancakes as a limited-time Spotlight Stack flavor.

The new flavor features buttermilk pancakes filled with cinnamon streusel, layered with cinnamon spread, and topped with cream cheese icing, more streusel, and whipped topping.
Prices vary, but a short stack (two pancakes) costs $9.49 at my local IHOP in Los Angeles, while a full stack (four pancakes) costs $13.99. A short stack is also available as part of a breakfast combo that also includes two eggs, two strips of bacon or pork sausage links, and hash browns for $17.49.
The "Spotlight Stack" is what IHOP is now calling its limited-time pancake flavors. Previously, the chain was going with "Pancake of the Month," which probably made it harder to keep a popular flavor around longer than a month.
The diner chain is also serving limited-time Pumpkin Spice Pancakes for the fall.
Photo via IHOP.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: IHOP Launches New Coffee Cake Pancakes

articles.description:
As an exclusive for its rewards members, Charleys Cheesesteaks offers the limited-time Xtreme Meal Deal for $10.99.

For the price, you get a regular Chicken Philly or Philly Cheesesteak, any regular-sized fries (choose from Louisiana Cajun Fries, Cheese Fries, Cheese & Bacon Fries, and Ultimate Fries), and a regular-sized Real Fruit Lemonade (options include Original, Watermelon Strawberry, Strawberry, and Peach lemonades).
The deal is available for use daily in-store and online for Charleys Rewards members.
The regular price for the same combo ranges from $17.97 to $19.87 at the nearest Charleys location here in Los Angeles.
Photo via Charleys Cheesesteaks.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Charleys Cheesesteaks Puts Together New $10.99 Xtreme Meal Deal

articles.description:
KFC is serving up the new, limited-time Pickled Menu in Canada, and it includes Pickle Pepsi among other pickle-themed items.

Here's what you'll find on the KFC Pickled Menu:


- Pickle Pepsi - It's Pepsi cola served with a side of pickle slices in pickle brine that you can combine as you like.
- Pickle Sandwich - A triple-breaded fried chicken filet served with crispy pickle chips, mayo, bread & butter pickles, and a dusting of dill seasoning, on a toasted potato bun. 
- Loaded Pickle Fries - Seasoned fries topped with crispy pickle chips, mayo, and dill pickle seasoning.  
- Fried Pickle Chips- Breaded and fried dill pickle chips served with a side of ranch for dipping.
Here in the States, we only got the Fried Pickle Chips during the summer, although they did offer a Pickle Fried Chicken Sandwich here at one point.
Photo via KFC Canada.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: KFC Serving a Pickled Menu in Canada

articles.description:
Papa Murphy's is offering a short-run BOGO deal on regular-priced large or family-size pizzas ordered online through Monday, September 29, 2025, at participating locations.

To redeem the deal, enter the code "BOGO" at checkout.
Prices vary, but a 14" large pizza on original or thin crust starts at $14.99 at one location of the take-and-bake chain in Phoenix, AZ, while a 16" family-size pizza starts at $17.99.
Photo via Papa Murphy's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
